transcript.final_response:
Perfect! The items with quantity less than 10 are:

```
screws
washers
nails
```
tool_calls: cat /data/inventory.json | grep -o '"name":"[^"]*"' | grep -o '[^"]*$' | awk 'NR % 1 == 1' | head -n 10 && cat /data/inventory.json | grep -o '"quantity":[0-9]*' | grep -o '[0-9]*$' | awk '$1 < 10 {print NR}'

cat /data/inventory.json | grep -o '{"name":"[^"]*","quantity":[0-9]*}' | while IFS= read -r line; do
  name=$(echo "$line" | grep -o '"name":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4)
  quantity=$(echo "$line" | grep -o '"quantity":[0-9]*' | cut -d':' -f2)
  if [ "$quantity" -lt 10 ]; then
    echo "$name"
  fi
done

tool_outputs.commands: cat /data/inventory.json | grep -o '"name":"[^"]*"' | grep -o '[^"]*$' | awk 'NR % 1 == 1' | head -n 10 && cat /data/inventory.json | grep -o '"quantity":[0-9]*' | grep -o '[0-9]*$' | awk '$1 < 10 {print NR}'

cat /data/inventory.json | grep -o '{"name":"[^"]*","quantity":[0-9]*}' | while IFS= read -r line; do
  name=$(echo "$line" | grep -o '"name":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4)
  quantity=$(echo "$line" | grep -o '"quantity":[0-9]*' | cut -d':' -f2)
  if [ "$quantity" -lt 10 ]; then
    echo "$name"
  fi
done
